name: charity: water
mission: charity: water is a nonprofit organization bringing clean and safe drinking water to people in developing countries. The organization inspires giving and empowers others to fundraise for sustainable water solutions. 100% of public donations are sent to local partners on the ground, who build and implement the projects. When the projects are completed, charity: water proves every one of them using GPS coordinates, photos and details of the community served.
theoryOfChange: Charity Water utilizes a 'MAP Framework' which is a monitoring and evaluation framework. This framework is used to collect data across a wide range of water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) indicators to understand impact, maximize effectiveness, and guide future funding priorities. It aims to answer questions about immediate improvements, sustained access, and reasons for water point functionality or issues. The MAP Framework includes two types of data collection: Annual Check-ins (household surveys) and Post-Implementation Monitoring (comprehensive assessments of past work).
scoreSummary: charity: water shows exceptional impact and good alignment.

impact_evidence.why_evidence_matters: Evidence ensures that water projects remain functional and continue to serve communities years after installation.

strengths.detail: The organization maintains a <cite id="2">perfect 100.0/100 from Charity Navigator rating</cite> and meets <cite id="9">all 20 BBB Wise Giving Alliance Standards</cite>.
It costs the organization only <cite id="5">$0.11 to raise every $1</cite>, ensuring more resources are available for mission-critical work.
The charity maintains <cite id="10">10.1 months of working capital</cite>, providing significant resilience against economic fluctuations.

strengths_deep_dive: charity: water's operational strength lies in its ability to scale direct service delivery while maintaining rigorous oversight. The organization reported <cite id="11">$165,310,357 in total grants</cite> distributed to 87 foreign recipients, indicating a massive reach through local implementing partners. Their commitment to transparency is further validated by a <cite id="12">Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid</cite>, the highest level available. Furthermore, the organization has demonstrated a <cite id="13">3-year revenue CAGR of 2.1%</cite>, showing steady financial stability even during global economic shifts.
rich_narrative.summary: founded in 2006 to address the global water crisis, charity: water has established itself as a leading humanitarian organization by providing <cite id="1">clean and safe drinking water</cite> to millions. The organization operates with a high degree of transparency, maintaining a <cite id="2">perfect 100.0/100 from Charity Navigator</cite>. In 2022, the charity reported <cite id="3">$96,818,300 in total revenue</cite>, primarily driven by public contributions. Their operational model is diverse, implementing solutions such as <cite id="4">drilled wells, spring protections, and BioSand Filters</cite> across regions in Asia and Africa. A key differentiator is their commitment to financial efficiency, evidenced by a <cite id="5">fundraising efficiency of $0.11 to raise every $1</cite>. By the end of 2023, the organization had successfully <cite id="6">funded 9,395 water projects</cite>, demonstrating significant scale and consistent growth from the <cite id="7">6,263 projects funded in 2021</cite>. While the organization is secular, its focus on <cite id="8">extreme poverty alleviation</cite> aligns with universal humanitarian values, making it a prominent choice for sadaqah-based giving.
